title: WATER-TARIFF-ENGINE
scope: USER-DIRECTED water domain, phase 2 of 12. Make water charges reflect real (Kenyan) water billing: tiered/block rates + standing charge + minimum bill + sewerage/garbage % + VAT, on top of the Phase-86 meter foundation. Brownfield biller (DO NOT break): WaterReadingObserver stamps reading.cost = consumption * WaterRateService::getEffectiveRate (flat 3-tier building->PaymentConfiguration->config 150); InvoiceService::calculateWaterCharges sums approved+uninvoiced reading.cost (consumption) or building.water_flat_rate (flat) into invoice.water_due (a FLAT decimal column; total_due = rent+water+arrears+late_fees-wallet via Money::bcmath). Invoices generate via invoices:generate / invoices:automate (daily 06:00). Money is decimal:2 on water. NON-DESTRUCTIVE RULE: when no tiered bands / standing / sewerage / vat are configured, the computed charge MUST equal today's (flat rate * consumption, or flat_water_rate) byte-for-byte. RESEQUENCED at scout (re-right-size, not drop): WaterConnection (universal billable entity) -> Phase 94 (clients, where it is load-bearing — avoids rebuilding the biller twice); apportioned billing_mode + common-area + borehole production-cost capture + effective-dated tariff SCHEDULING -> dedicated later water phases. water_source column IS added now (cheap, foundational for Phase 91/92). water_billing_type stays the billing-mode axis (consumption=metered|flat_rate|none); apportioned NOT added yet.

findings.title: Add tariff-depth columns to the canonical water config (landlord + building)
findings.evidence: payment_configurations + buildings only carry water_billing_type + water_unit_rate + flat_water_rate. No tiered bands, standing charge, minimum bill, sewerage %, VAT %, or water source.
findings.remediation: Migration adds to BOTH payment_configurations and buildings: tiered_tariffs (json nullable — [{from,to,rate}] bands), water_standing_charge (decimal nullable), water_minimum_charge (decimal nullable), water_sewerage_percent (decimal nullable), water_vat_percent (decimal nullable), water_source (string nullable: borehole|county|mixed). Building NULL = inherit landlord. Models: fillable + casts (tiered_tariffs array, decimals decimal:2). Phase87 test: columns exist + cast.

findings.title: WaterTariffService: tiered/block consumption charge
findings.evidence: Consumption is billed at a single flat rate; real water tariffs are stepped (first N units @ A, next @ B).
findings.remediation: WaterTariffService::computeConsumptionCharge(float $consumption, array|context $tariff): float — when tiered_tariffs bands are set, charge each block at its rate (sum of band_units * band_rate, last band open-ended); when not set, fall back to flat unit_rate * consumption (identical to today). Context resolved building->landlord->default (mirror WaterRateService). decimal:2 rounding. Phase87 test: 25 units over [0-10@50,10+@70] = 1550; no-bands = flat*consumption unchanged.

findings.title: WaterTariffService: assemble period charge (standing + sewerage% + VAT% + minimum)
findings.evidence: No standing charge, sewerage levy, VAT, or minimum bill is applied to the water charge.
findings.remediation: WaterTariffService::assembleWaterCharge(float $base, context): float — subtotal = base + standing_charge; sewerage = subtotal * sewerage_percent/100; vat = (subtotal+sewerage) * vat_percent/100; total = subtotal+sewerage+vat; total = max(total, minimum_charge). All components default 0/unset => total = base (non-destructive). decimal:2. Phase87 test: base 1000 + standing 100 + sewerage 10% + vat 0 + min 0 = 1210; unset extras => 1000; minimum floor applies.

findings.title: Reading cost uses the tiered consumption charge
findings.evidence: WaterReadingObserver computes cost = consumption * flat rate.
findings.remediation: WaterReadingObserver (creating + updating) computes cost via WaterTariffService::computeConsumptionCharge for the reading's meter/unit context. Non-destructive: no bands => identical to the old flat computation. Keep the existing previous/current/consumption logic. Phase87 test: a reading on a tiered building gets the stepped cost; a reading on a flat building is unchanged.

findings.title: Invoice water charge applies the period assembly (standing/sewerage/VAT/min)
findings.evidence: InvoiceService::calculateWaterCharges returns the raw consumption sum or flat rate with no standing/sewerage/VAT/minimum.
findings.remediation: calculateWaterCharges: consumption base = sum(approved+uninvoiced reading.cost) [already tiered via the observer]; flat base = flat_water_rate; then water_due = assembleWaterCharge(base, context). Per-period standing/sewerage/VAT/min apply once per invoice. Non-destructive when extras unset. markWaterReadingsAsInvoiced unchanged. Phase87 test: an invoice with standing+sewerage configured stores the assembled water_due; with none configured it equals today's value; existing invoice tests stay green.

findings.title: Water settings editor exposes the tariff fields (global + per-building) + water source
findings.evidence: WaterSettingsForm.vue + UpdateWaterSettingsRequest + WaterSettingsController only handle billing_type + unit/flat rate.
findings.remediation: Extend the shared editor: a tiered-bands sub-editor (add/remove {from,to,rate} rows), standing charge, minimum charge, sewerage %, VAT %, water source select — global + per-building (inherit-aware). UpdateWaterSettingsRequest rules for all (nullable numeric/array; percents 0-100; water_source in borehole,county,mixed). Controller persists them on PaymentConfiguration + Building (inherit => null). i18n en/sw/ar. Phase87 test: landlord PUT persists tiered bands + standing + sewerage; caretaker still 403 (Phase 86).

findings.title: Phase 87 behavioral + surface tests
findings.evidence: New tariff math + config need regression guards, and the live biller must stay correct.
findings.remediation: Phase87WaterTariffEngineTest (tiered charge, assembly with standing/sewerage/VAT/min, NON-DESTRUCTIVE parity = today's value when unset, reading cost tiered, invoice water_due assembled, config persists) + Phase87WaterTariffSurfaceTest (schema, WaterTariffService bound, lang parity). Existing water + invoice suites stay green.

findings.title: Runbook + closeout + memory
findings.evidence: Tariff engine needs operator docs; roadmap resequencing must be recorded.
findings.remediation: docs/runbooks/water.md tariff section (tiered bands, standing/sewerage/VAT/min, water_source, non-destructive default, what was resequenced to 94/later). nav-audit clean. Multi-reviewer pass (read-only). Memory: phase87 plan + forward-path + pending-path; record WaterConnection->94 + apportioned/production-cost/effective-dated deferrals.

closeout.summary: Water tariff depth on the live biller, applied NON-DESTRUCTIVELY (unset => today's flat charge). TARIFF-MODEL: payment_configurations + buildings gain tiered_tariffs (json bands) + water_standing_charge/minimum_charge/sewerage_percent/vat_percent + water_source. TARIFF-SERVICE: WaterTariffService::computeConsumptionCharge (tiered/block or flat fallback) + assembleWaterCharge (base + standing + sewerage% + VAT%, floored at minimum). BILLING-WIRE: WaterReadingObserver reading.cost = flat per-reading estimate; InvoiceService::calculateWaterCharges tiers the PERIOD AGGREGATE consumption then assembles the fixed components (the authoritative charge). CONFIG-UI: shared WaterSettingsForm gains a global tiered-bands editor + standing/min/sewerage/VAT/water_source (global + per-building inherit-aware); UpdateWaterSettingsRequest validates incl band contiguity; controller persists; i18n en/sw/ar. CI: behavioral + surface tests + runbook.
closeout.tests: Phase-87 tests: WaterTariffEngine 11 + Surface 5. Full water suite + WaterReadingController + InvoiceWorkflowIntegration 90 regression green. Pint/build/eslint/nav-audit clean.
closeout.review: Multi-reviewer read-only pass (CodeRabbit + pr-review-toolkit code-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter) caught + fixed: CRITICAL per-reading-vs-per-period tiering (silent under-bill on multi-reading periods) -> tier the period aggregate at invoice time; CRITICAL no band-coverage validation (gaps/overlap/inversion silently bill at zero) -> withValidator contiguity rule; HIGH minimum_charge flooring a zero base (bills no-reading tenants) -> no readings bills 0; MEDIUM per-building dead tiered config + empty-[] trap -> bands landlord-global v1 + added missing per-building min/VAT inputs. Regression tests added for each.
closeout.constraints_preserved: Live biller correct + non-destructive (flat buildings byte-for-byte; verified by InvoiceWorkflowIntegration + non-destructive tests). Money decimal:2. water Settings landlord-only (Phase 86). RESEQUENCED (re-right-size, not dropped): WaterConnection -> Phase 94; apportioned billing_mode + common-area + borehole production-cost + effective-dated SCHEDULING + per-building tiered-bands UI -> later water phases. water_source carried for 91/92.
